Import & Export
Paste data directly from Google Sheets or CSV

Paste from Google Sheets

How to import:
1. In Google Sheets, select all cells (Ctrl+A) on a tab → Copy (Ctrl+C)
2. Paste below — tabs and newlines are preserved
3. Select which tab type, then click Import
Supported columns (singles/slabs/sales): name/product · set · language · type · grade · grader · certNo · qty · listPrice/carousellPrice/unitPrice · costPrice · condition · notes · status
ETBs: status · product · totalPrice · condition · date
Booster Boxes: date · product · unitPrice · qty · totalPrice · status · notes
Booster Packs: date · product · unitPrice · qty · totalPrice · status · notes
eBay Purchases: date · status · tracking · declared · product · priceUsd · freightSgd · totalSgd · targetTable
Detected type: —

Export

User Guide
How to use Kujira Collectibles · last updated 24/05/2026
Contents
Loading guide...
🗑 Trash
Deleted items — restored within 30 days · auto-purged on every load

🕓 Version History

☁ Synced to cloud
Loading versions from cloud…
↵ to add
Singles: Name Lang $price cost $X Slabs: PSA/TAG/CGC grade Name #cert $price
Enter sold price to see profit

✦ Smart Add

Type or paste one item per line. The parser auto-detects slabs, sealed singles, and raw singles.
Price = cost. Every $X you enter is the cost price (what you paid). Market price and Carousell asking price are set later on the row itself — not at entry time.
Examples:
Eevee 173 EN NM $9 → raw single, cost S$9
Charmander 44 sealed EN $30 → sealed single, cost S$30
Eevee 173 TAG 10 cert L6786028 rank 10th $81 → slab, cost S$81
PSA 9 Bulbasaur 143 #119569490 $77 → slab, cost S$77
Supports: TAG/PSA/CGC grades, EN/JP/CN/ID languages, sealed keyword, qty (e.g. x3), cert numbers (#), ranks (1st/2nd…)
Preview — review before saving

Add Single

Add Slab

Mark as Sold

Marking as sold. This will create a sales record automatically.

Add Sale

Per-item cost breakdown

Push to GitHub Pages

Pushes this HTML file directly to your GitHub repo, triggering an instant GitHub Pages deploy. Your token is stored only in this browser — never sent anywhere except GitHub's API.
GitHub Personal Access Token
Generate token — needs repo scope
Repo
File path in repo
The filename as it appears in your repo (e.g. index.html or Kujira_Collectibles_Inventory_17.html)
Commit message
⚡ After pushing, GitHub Pages usually updates within 60 seconds. Check your site at https://julianchow21.github.io/Kujira-Collectibles/
